meaning: n.耕地,种植园,大农场,森林,人造林,殖民
examples: They were sold to plantation owners and forced to work long.
They were sold to plantation owners and forced to work long hours.
Most visitors to the Caribbean are rich, like the plantation owner.

Together, they started the business in 2002 in the former North Shore plantation town of Haleiwa.
